case_title: BRIDGETTE WILLIAMS VS. LISA M. GAMACHE

docket_entries.description: SC-220 REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT GAMACHE, LISA M.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BRIDGETTE WILLIAMS. DEFENDANT LISA M. GAMACHE DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER SC-222 ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED. PAYMENT OF $2000.00 JUDGMENT. [A] PAYMENTS OF $200.00 ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING 10/1/16 UNTIL (DATE OF FINAL PAYMENT) 7/10/17. AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $200.00. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENT IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT WILL BE PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS NOT MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY NOTIFY THE COURT TO CANCEL THE PAYMENT PLAN AND THE ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE WILL BECOME DUE AND COLLECTIBLE
